hero.tagline: Earn sats. Build habits. Change lives.
hero.subtitle: A habit tracker powered by Bitcoin Lightning that rewards task completion with real sats.
hero.pitch: Parents create habits. Kids earn Bitcoin.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from task to sats
howItWorks.step1Desc: A sponsor — parent, community, or yourself — loads sats into a Lightning wallet
howItWorks.step2Desc: Create habits and daily tasks with sat rewards attached to each one
howItWorks.step3Desc: AI bot sends Duolingo-style reminders. Motivational, persistent, fun.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Finish the task, get verified, receive sats instantly via Lightning

useCases.title: Real Use Cases
useCases.subtitle: Not just another habit tracker — a tool that changes lives
useCases.case1Desc: Parents fund a Lightning wallet. Kids earn sats by completing chores and responsibilities. It's the modern allowance — digital, instant, and teaches financial literacy from day one.
useCases.case1Item1: Make the bed, do laundry, homework, wash the car
useCases.case1Item2: Kids learn to save, spend, and stack sats
useCases.case1Item4: Builds responsibility through real economic incentives
useCases.case2Desc: Community pools where members earn sats for working out. Inspired by real conversations at La Crypta about zapping people who exercise. Social accountability meets Lightning rewards.
useCases.case2Item2: Members earn sats for verified workouts
useCases.case2Item3: Integration with open-source fitness trackers (Nostr-based, self-hosted)
useCases.case2Item4: Nostr zaps for celebrating milestones together

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: Built on Bitcoin-native, privacy-first technologies
techStack.lightningDesc: Instant, near-free micro-payments. NWC for wallet integration. The backbone of BitByBit rewards.
techStack.lightning1Desc: Rewards arrive the moment a task is verified. No waiting, no processing.
techStack.lightning2Desc: Send 10 sats or 10,000 — fees are fractions of a cent. Perfect for micro-rewards.
techStack.lightning3Desc: Anyone with a phone can receive rewards. No bank account, no KYC, no borders.
techStack.lightning4Desc: No company controls it. No one can freeze funds or shut you down. Money that's truly yours.
techStack.nostrDesc: Decentralized identity & login. Zaps for social rewards. NIP-05 verification.
techStack.nostr1Desc: Use your Nostr key to sign in. No emails, no passwords, no centralized servers.
techStack.nostr2Desc: Connect your Lightning wallet via NWC. Sponsors authorize automatic payments when approving tasks.
techStack.nostr3Desc: Celebrate family or community achievements with zaps. Every completed streak can receive public support.
techStack.openclawDesc: AI-powered bot for Duolingo-style reminders, notifications, and smart task scheduling.
techStack.openclaw1Desc: Bots that remind you to complete tasks with motivational messages. Persistent but not annoying, Duolingo-style.
techStack.openclaw2Desc: Our claw bots (Annaloppo & Topolino) generate PRs, review code, and write project documentation.
techStack.openclaw3Desc: In the future, bots that verify tasks automatically using AI. No manual approval needed.
techStack.whisperDesc: Speech-to-text for accessibility. Complete tasks by voice. No screen needed.
techStack.whisper1Desc: Say 'I finished making the bed' and Whisper transcribes and logs the task. Ideal for kids or people with motor difficulties.
techStack.whisper2Desc: No need to touch your phone. Interact with BitByBit by speaking. Inclusive and practical for daily life.

roadmap.title: Hackathon Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: 8 months, 8 hackathons — each edition builds on the last
roadmap.marDesc: Core Lightning payment flow. Wallet integration. Send and receive sats for task completion.
roadmap.aprDesc: Nostr login. User profiles. NIP-05 verification. Family accounts.
roadmap.mayDesc: Community rewards. Social zapping for fitness milestones. Streak celebrations.
roadmap.junDesc: Marketplace for task templates. Premium features. Sponsor dashboards.
roadmap.julDesc: Photo verification of task completion. AI validates images. Decentralized storage.
roadmap.augDesc: OpenClaw bot for Duolingo-style reminders. AI insights. Automated task verification.
roadmap.sepDesc: Custom Lightning node. Optimized routing. Cashu mint for instant micro-rewards.
roadmap.octDesc: Full platform launch. All features combined. Kids, fitness, assisted living — one app.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Four humans, two bots, one mission: make kids earn their sats
team.anixDesc: Keeps the code clean and the team on track. Probably debugging at 3am.
team.llopoRole: The bitcoiner of the family. Licensed vibe coder
team.llopoDesc: If it doesn't run on Lightning, it doesn't run. Certified in vibes-driven development.
team.wanderRole: Licensed in 'My grandma can use it' & tester
team.wanderDesc: If Wander can't break it, nobody can. Chief UX critic and bug whisperer.
team.leonDesc: Can sell ice to penguins. Turns our spaghetti ideas into 3-minute magic.
team.annaloppoDesc: The team's OpenClaw bot. Generates PRs, reviews code, and writes docs. Doesn't sleep, doesn't eat, doesn't get paid.
team.topolinoDesc: The second artificial brain. Researches, tests, and finds bugs before Wander does. Almost.

cta.preview: See how it works without signing up →

sponsorDashboard.noFamily: You haven't created a family yet

onboarding.subtitle: Here's how BitByBit works in 4 steps
onboarding.step1Title: BitByBit rewards you with real sats
onboarding.step1Desc: Every time you complete a task, you can earn sats (Bitcoin's smallest unit) straight to your wallet.
onboarding.step1Detail: Sats are sent via Lightning Network — instant, feeless, and no bank needed.
onboarding.step2Desc: Families are groups where sponsors create rewarded tasks for other members.
onboarding.step2Detail: Ask your sponsor for the invite code, or create your own family and invite others. You can be in multiple families.
onboarding.step3Desc: You can create tasks for yourself (no reward) or, as a sponsor, assign them to other members with sat rewards.
onboarding.step3Detail: Example: 'Make the bed' — 50 sats per day. Set frequency, color, and verification type.
onboarding.step4Desc: Mark your tasks as done. If they have a reward, the sponsor approves and sats arrive instantly.
onboarding.step4Detail: Build streaks, stack sats, and become the best version of yourself — one habit at a time.
